title: '$3.7B lost to deepfakes' — Why social media is the perfect launchpad for AI fraud
summary: Not every viral fake causes harm, though. Everyday communication channels are increasingly in the firing line as well, contributing $174 million between them: phone calls ($71 million), video platforms ($62 million), and messaging apps ($41 million).
